title: caruelina parviflora
intro: Caruelina parviflora, also known as Small-flowered Caruelina, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Caruelina parviflora include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Caruelina parviflora can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
